What travelers are saying

  • CyCy F
    Rio de Janeiro, RJ760 contributions
    beauty, chaos and nature in the heart of Rio!!!
    Being in Park Lage is feeling elsewhere... with that European air, the green pool in the center, the gallery, the majestic mansion and the forest around... A true refuge in the middle of the city. 🌿 But be connected: be prepared to stay at least an hour in line just to take that classic photo in the courtyard of the palace, see? The disorganization is real, and waiting can be exhausting, especially under the Californian heat. My tip: bring water, a hat or umbrella or buy it right there, but prepare your pocket. The restaurant, which occupies the most beautiful building in the park, has a beautiful view, but honestly didn't win me for the food. Of course, taste is personal, so go and draw your own conclusions. 😉 Now, as a park, I like it a lot! Free entrance, very green, sagues, monkeys, incredible trails (including the one that leads to Christ the Redeemer), and that silence in the middle of the forest that recharges the soul. Ah! To visit the palace from the inside, it is necessary to book in advance through the official website or the Sympla. The idea is good, but in practice I found everything very unorganized, I confess. Anyway, it's the kind of place that loves even with its flaws. Vale ir, vale curtir... But go with patience!
    By Cycy, with sensitivity and truth
    Review of: Parque Lage
    Automatically translated
    Written June 27, 2025
  • Daniel Cruz
    Fortaleza, CE1 contribution
    Incredible place
    Without a doubt this is one of the most beautiful places you can see. The waters are very crystal clear, calm and warm and the sun is refreshing. The great tip is to go to the maritime terminal of Mother of God and make the private tour with the Netto, from "@passeiosidf" (Passeios Island dos Frades). This is done through prior scheduling. This is a serious and competent professional, who treats his clients with respect and dedication, offering excellent tips and taking the best photos. He knows the area very well, including the best restaurants. My partner and I had a fantastic and unforgettable day in this place where God made it a matter to show his art.
    Review of: Ilha dos Frades
    Automatically translated
    Written May 16, 2026
  • Maria Solange O
    Farroupilha, RS35,378 contributions
    Heaven is here!
    The Lagoon of Paradise takes its name because it is a true paradise. The fresh, warm water, with nets of rest in the water make this destination to be competed. The infrastructure is excellent, especially in day use. Access is made by 4x4 vehicles, buggy or quad bike from the village of Jericoacoara.

  • Alessandra A
    Santo Andre, SP1 contribution
    Cold water
    We went to the christ corpus holiday park was quite crowded, enough queue to go to the main attractions to pick up soda and fried potato took about 50 min for us to serve. But what really disappointed was that the water wasn 't hot . Only a few pools were warmer. The vast majority were quite cold . I don't know if at that time of year or so. Because my oldest memory is that the waters were very hot. Although it was sunny all the time I felt quite cold in the park.
    What impressed me positively were the cleanliness of the bathrooms and dressing rooms with hot and very clean shower near many parks I have visited.
    Review of: Thermas dos Laranjais

  • Layeh
    Rio de Janeiro, RJ6 contributions
    A quick stop but worth it
    I passed this park to change tour bus. The mirante is very beautiful, gives great photos. A tip for those who are afraid: don’t look down when it’s time to climb the viewpoint or cross the bridge. The iron grids are safe.
    Review of: Tangua Park

  • JuhAmaral
    Americana, SP428 contributions
    Mandatory Parade in BH
    The Central Market is a must stop for visitors to Belo Horizonte. The place is large and full of shops and restaurants. Since many boxes sell the same products (mainly cheeses, mining candy and cachaça), it is worth taking a round and researching the prices before buying, as they vary greatly. You want to take everything!
    They have their own parking, which saves lives, because the traffic in the surrounding area is super chaotic. Highly recommended!
    Review of: Mercado Central de Belo Horizonte
    Automatically translated
    Written June 9, 2026
  • João Gustavo P
    Lages, SC18 contributions
    Amazing and fun!
    More than recommended, for all ages, but especially for school-age children. The museum is very complete and quite interactive. I had read on the internet that the average duration was 1.5 to 3 hours. Well, we passed four o'clock and the last parts had to be just a look. For those who are physics, chemistry and the like is a theme park. The museum is run by the state government, so tickets have a fair price, different from many attractions in São Paulo. Don't stop knowing!
    Review of: Museu Catavento
    Automatically translated
    Written December 9, 2025
  • Edinéia M
    1 contribution
    I expected more
    The ride is only worth it if the tide is very favorable for this event, otherwise it is better to stay on the beach. I did the tide tour without knowing the tide condition (the guide who sold us the tour did not inform us about the true tide condition), the water was above the waist and was not crystal clear, and it was impossible to distinguish whether we were in a natural pool or not. In this place, where we went down the hill and the guide said it would be a natural pool, there was a boat selling drinks (including alcohol) and snacks. The presence of that boat suggested that there is no environmental monitoring on site. The buggy ride had a very short and fast route compared to what we did at Gunga Beach and Maragogi, also didn't worth it.
    Review of: Praia de São Miguel dos Milagres
    Automatically translated
    Written November 8, 2025
  • Marcelo B
    Brasilia, DF2,348 contributions
    CASTÁLIA-Pontão-Brasilia-DF: good menu, excellent service and pricing
    CASTÁLIA-PONTÃO-Brasilia-DF - Bistro type snacks, until a certain time, serve dishes say executive. The bulk of Cardápio is for snacks and the like. It is located in the large and beautiful Pontão, leisure and entertainment area of Plano Piloto de Brasília, on the edge of Lake Paranoá, between the Pontes Honestino Guimarães and JK. A scenario and so much!
    Castalia has a strategic location in this magnificent leisure area of Brasília, opposite the space of Events, the venue of the festivities held there, Christmas, Carnival, S.João, etc. However, both its building, and its indoor are simple, even its tables and chairs. The strong bridge is their food, varied, well prepared (even we are invited to check their making) and well served by an amazing team of waiters and attendants, all communicative and helpful, from this fair until I saw one of them helping in the driving of a baby cart...
    We were in a family group of 12 people, among grandparents, parents, children and grandchildren. I think we've tasted a good deal of your food, paying a price on account.
    As a constructive breakthrough, I suggest that the management of Castalia see how to modulate more into account, its restaurant ventilation system.
    Review of: Pontao do Lago Sul
    Automatically translated
    Written February 9, 2026
  • maujlima
    Campinas, SP537 contributions
    Every Brazilian has to know this place
    Spectacular, one of the best museums in the world.
    A museum park, open sky, focused on facilities, with amazing works, such as the 'Sound of the Earth', 'Cosmococa' and 'Galeria Adriana Varejõo.
    In addition to the facilities there are works and sculptures spread out, as well as art galleries and photographs.
    Inhotim Tabém is specialized in landscaping, having several gardens, mounted by artists around the park, as works of art itself.
    Access to works does not usually take long, even with queues, already snack bars and restaurants, on holidays, it is chaos, waiting hours.
    To get to know the park, it takes at least two days to get to know the museum park.
    Review of: Inhotim
    Automatically translated
    Written May 3, 2026
  • BrakiWorldTraveler
    Belgrade, Serbia23,891 contributions
    Good market in sketchy surroundings
    This is SP central market located in a historic edifice in downtown. Place is huge with several gates. We walked to it and I must say the area around is not that good - be aware of your surroundings and belongings.
    Inside you'll find all kinds of fresh fruits, vegetables, meat, fish, spices,.....
    I've read the reviews before and didn't get scammed by persistant sellers - we bought on stalls where sellers weren't aggressive and prices were displayed.
    Review of: Mercado Municipal de São Paulo
    Written March 18, 2026
  • Indianara D
    17 contributions
    Bad experience
    Bad experience. Poor structure, very tumultuous, the ride of the quad until it's cool, but the machines are old, helmet horrible/old/without protector. During the tour, the 2 stops with a very poor structure. All very expensive! We chose lunch at Proa Beach Club, require a minimum consumption of 400,00. Bad and very expensive food! The beach, horrible, walking in the sand, impossible!
    Go to beach Ipioca, especially for the Hibiscus, pays a lot, as well as the beach Barra de São Miguel. On the beach of the French we went to a chic barbecue, Mister Grill, we paid almost 500,00 and we left virtually without dinner - bad food, refined meats, horrible!
    Review of: Praia do Gunga
    Automatically translated
    Written March 15, 2026
  • CG
    Porto Alegre, RS100 contributions
    Very nice place
    First time we visited the place, despite the many times we have already visited Gramado. The impression I had before visiting Le Jardin was that it was a small environment, but it is exactly the opposite. Go with at least 2 hours available so you can take advantage of the place and get to know all the varieties of plants and be able to explore the environments to take beautiful photos. They have a place for meals and a store that sells products of their own manufacture, in addition to marketing other brands, such as some Nesti Dante products imported from Italy for example.
    Review of: Le Jardin Parque de Lavanda
    Automatically translated
    Written April 10, 2026
  • Lucas Gabriel Pereira de Paula
    Belo Horizonte, MG67 contributions
    Mirror Beach
    The beach of the mirror in fact is very beautiful, we were in a period of average tide, so the “mirror” effect was not so sharp, but still it is a beautiful landscape. It is a beach well away from Porto Seguro so I advise you to take water and some snack for the journey, the road is not the best so the transport balances quite, those who get sick would be good to take a cure. At the most I liked quite the tour, score 8/10 for this beach (considering everything). We stayed in Apoena tent, delicious food, ice beer, prices within the expected for a tent on the beach, minimum consumption of 80 reais per person but it was worth it! OBS: I did not want to go to the famous stone because the waiting time for a photo is from 40min to 1:20min, I chose to explore other beauties of the beach.
    Review of: Praia do Espelho
    Automatically translated
    Written April 27, 2026
